case_title: FRED MPAMBARA VS. BENJAMIN FRANLIN PLUMBING

docket_entries.description: SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF MPAMBARA, FRED AS TO DEFENDANT BENJAMIN FRANLIN PLUMBING
COPYING FEES (10 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF MPAMBARA, FRED

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-04-2015 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-04-2015 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS REPRESENTED BY JOHN ROSSI--GENERAL MANAGER. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - SIGNED SERVED JUL-14-2015, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT BENJAMIN FRANLIN PLUMBING
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-04-2015 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MPAMBARA, FRED RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BENJAMIN FRANLIN PLUMBING $500.00 PRINCIPAL, $90.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $590.00, DEFENDANT AGREES TO AN AMENDMENT OF PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM TO $10,000 AND WAIVES NOTICE OF THE INCREASED CLAIM. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,000.00 FILED BY MPAMBARA, FRED AS TO DEFENDANT BENJAMIN FRANLIN PLUMBING ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-04-2015 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT BENJAMIN FRANLIN PLUMBING
